scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All six pass criteria met: sequential calls (fraud before gateway, no Promise.all), AC6 explicitly tested with expect(gateway.charge).not.toHaveBeenCalled(), AC4/AC5 chain original error via cause property, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway, all 6 ACs tested with mock services (12 tests), and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: AC6 is tested both in the AC2+AC6 block and again in AC4 (gateway-not-called on fraud service failure), showing thorough coverage of the no-side-effect invariant
Call ordering is asserted independently, not just implied by sequential awaits
AC3 includes a fallback test for missing declineReason, going beyond the minimum requirement
Cause chaining verified to be the original Error instance, not just a string copy
Dependency-injected design with interfaces avoids mocking complexities and keeps tests deterministic
